goal: Fix the shuffle 'deal' animation (was shaking in place on re-shuffle) and add 12 new shop-exclusive decks
done: (1) ANIMATION FIX (js/main.js animateDealStack): on the shuffle button the prior step (animateCollectSlots) leaves every card translated to the board centre; animateDealStack then measured getBoundingClientRect of the already-centred cards, so the computed fly-out distance was ~0 and the 'deal' degenerated into an in-place scale pulse — i.e. each card just shook. Fix: clear each card's transform to 'none' + force a reflow (void boardEl.offsetWidth) BEFORE measuring, so we read the true GRID position; then gather into a centre pile (slight alternating tilt = a deck) and deal out one-by-one (staggered 78ms small boards / tightened on the 40-card Celtic to stay <2s). Now it visibly deals on both first-paint AND re-shuffle, for daily + question + full. (2) 12 NEW SHOP DECKS (founder 'keep adding'): wired boo-familiar, cats-of-the-ink-peaks, chaos-familiar, cloudmew, crimson-reverie, crumblemew, meowgame, mochimew, neopurr, night-shift-oracle, snappaws, starpaw into data.js DECKS (all role:'shop', unlock_day:null) + SHOP_DECKS, with Thai names. Their full art is on the CDN; -200 thumbs are generated in a background pass (UPRIGHT + back only — reversed not needed in flip mode, founder confirmed). Added 4 face-aspect entries (crimson-reverie/meowgame/night-shift-oracle/starpaw = 768/1376; rest + all backs = default 848/1264). shop.js deck cell now falls back from 00-back-200 to full-res 00-back if the thumb isn't up yet. cybermeow + noir-social SKIPPED (not on CDN, local-source only — like halloween). Cache-bust ?v=20260621d -> 20260622a; www synced.
root_cause: animateDealStack measured card positions after a centre-collect transform, yielding ~0 fly-out distance.
fix: reset transform + reflow before measuring grid coords; deal from a centre pile. Plus 12 role:'shop' decks wired with purchase-gating + face aspects + back-art fallback.
verified: headless shop.html: 13-deck grid renders with back art + 100-coin buttons
boo-familiar/00-back-200 confirmed live on CDN (thumb pass in progress)
